---
title: "Facial cosmetics and attractiveness: Comparing the effect sizes of professionally-applied cosmetics and identity"
authors: "Jones, A. L., & Kramer, R."
year: 2016
date: 2016-01-01
pub-journal: "PLOS ONE"
volume: "11(10)"
pages: "e0164218"
doi: "10.1371/journal.pone.0164218"
pdf: "assets/papers/2016/jones_kramer_2016.pdf"
categories: [cosmetics, attractiveness]
---
